title: Apartment calm small dog with children
prompt: I live in an apartment and want a calm small dog good with children.
notes: Checks whether the Copilot extracts home type, size, temperament, and child/family compatibility from one natural request.

title: Cat-safe introduction
prompt: I have a cat at home and need a dog that can adjust safely.
notes: Checks that a cat query produces cat-related criteria instead of unrelated apartment or status-only criteria.

title: Apartment with longer walks
prompt: I live in an apartment but enjoy longer walks.
notes: Checks that explicit longer-walk preference is not simplified into short walks or low activity.

title: Deterministic coat color filter
notes: Checks deterministic filter behavior and makes sure coat color is not described as a status filter.

title: Calm companion for recovering dog
prompt: I have a sick dog recovering at home and need a calm dog that will not overwhelm him.
notes: Checks sensitive-dog compatibility evidence and cautions around slow introductions.

title: Active dog for yard
prompt: I want an active dog for a house with a yard.
notes: Checks active lifestyle and yard/house criteria.
